titles.title: My Help Comes From the Lord

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v3 v4 v4 v5 v6 v7 v4 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will lift up mine eyes to the hills From whence cometh my help, My help cometh from the Lord, The Lord, which made heaven and earth.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He said, He would not suffer thy foot, Thy foot to be moved, The Lord that keepeth thee, He will not slumber nor sleep.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, the Lord is thy keeper the Lord is thy shade, Upon thy right hand, upon thy right hand, No the sun shall not smite thee by day, Nor the moon by night He shall preserve thy soul, even forevermore, My help, my help, my help, All of my help cometh from the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My help, my help, my help, All of my help cometh from the Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lift up mine eyes unto the hills, All of my help cometh from the Lord.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will lift up mine eyes unto the hills, From whence cometh my help, All of my help cometh from the Lord.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Gonna keep my eyes on You Lord, I won't look to the left, I won't look to right, I'll stay focused on You Jesus, All of my help cometh from the Lord.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I lift up my eyes, I look to the hills (He is my strength), All of my help cometh from the Lord.
